mapper.select: SELECT user_id, user_pw, user_name, user_email, user_role, slack_user_id, profile_image_stored_name, profile_image_content_type FROM tb_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT user_id, user_name, user_email, user_role FROM tb_user ORDER BY user_name, user_id
SELECT slack_user_id FROM tb_user WHERE user_name = #{mention} OR user_id = #{mention} ORDER BY CASE WHEN user_name = #{mention} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user SET profile_image_stored_name = NULL, profile_image_content_type = NULL WHERE user_id = #{userId}
